name: briefcast
description: Personal AI podcast app. Use when the user asks to play, find, or generate a podcast or briefing episode; wants to browse their podcast library, history, or downloads; wants to manage playlists; or asks what news is trending. This plugin streams audio through the BriefCast desktop app running locally.

health.description: Health check. Returns { ok: true, service: 'briefcast-desktop-ts' } when the local BriefCast app is running and reachable.

status.description: Returns API status and provider availability info. Response: { ok: boolean, providerStatus: object }

settings_get.description: Get current app settings (AI providers, news sources, TTS voice, user preferences). Response: AppSettings object.

settings_save.description: Save app settings. Body should be a full or partial AppSettings object (providers, sources, preferences, tts). Response: updated AppSettings.

params.name: settings
params.description: AppSettings object with fields: providers, sources, preferences, tts

news_sync.description: Fetch and index the latest news articles from all configured sources. Response: { fetched: number, inserted: number, updated: number, skipped: number }

news_search.description: Search news articles by keyword, semantic similarity, or hybrid mode. Response: array of SearchResult objects each with title, url, summary, sourceName, publishedAt, imageUrl, keywordScore, semanticScore, hybridScore.

news_preference_search.description: Search articles matching a natural-language topic description derived from user preferences. Response: array of SearchResult objects.

params.name: description
params.description: Natural language topic description (e.g. 'AI and machine learning breakthroughs')

news_financial.description: Get the latest financial news articles. Response: array of SearchResult objects.

briefings_generate.description: Generate a new daily text briefing from today's top articles. Response: { briefing: Briefing, articlesUsed: SearchResult[] }. Briefing has id, date, content, createdAt.

briefings_list.description: List past daily text briefings in reverse chronological order. Response: array of Briefing objects { id, date, content, createdAt }.

library_recommendations.description: Get recommended podcast episodes for the user based on their preferences and history. Response: array of RecommendationPodcast { id, title, subcategory, sourceName, sourceType, summary, url, publishedAt, estimatedDurationSeconds, imageResource }.

library_trending.description: Get currently trending podcast episodes. Response: array of RecommendationPodcast objects.

history_list.description: Get the user's podcast listen history in reverse chronological order. Response: array of ListenHistoryItem { recommendationId, title, sourceName, listenedAt, progressSeconds, durationSeconds }.

history_track.description: Record that the user listened to a podcast episode. Response: the created ListenHistoryItem.

params.name: recommendationId
params.description: ID of the recommendation/episode that was listened to

podcast_daily.description: Get today's pre-generated daily podcast episode. Returns null if not yet generated. Response: Podcast { id, title, subcategory, source_name, image_url, audio_url, transcript_url, duration_seconds, published_at, is_daily }.

podcast_force_daily.description: Force regenerate today's daily podcast even if one already exists. Response: Podcast object or null.

podcast_generate_audio.description: Generate a full audio podcast episode for a specific recommendation. This synthesizes speech and returns the Podcast record with audio_url. Response: Podcast object.

params.name: recommendationId
params.description: ID of the recommendation to generate audio for

podcast_generate_summary.description: Generate a summary podcast that wraps multiple individual podcast episodes into one. Response: Podcast object with is_summary: true.

params.name: podcastIds
params.description: Array of podcast IDs to summarize

podcast_get.description: Get a specific podcast by its ID. Response: Podcast object or null.

params.name: podcastId
params.description: Podcast ID (used as URL path segment)

podcast_rate.description: Rate a podcast episode. Rating is a number (e.g. 1–5). Response: updated result object.

episode_generate.description: Generate a podcast episode (transcript + LRC lyrics + audio) for a recommendation. Returns base64-encoded audio. Response: { transcript: string, lyricsLrc: string, audioBase64: string }.

params.name: recommendationId
params.description: ID of the recommendation to generate a full episode for

downloads_list.description: List all downloaded (saved offline) podcast episodes. Response: array of DownloadPodcastItem { id, recommendationId, title, imageResource, audioResource, lyricsResource, savedAt }.

downloads_save.description: Save a podcast episode to the local downloads library. Response: DownloadPodcastItem.

params.name: recommendationId
params.description: ID of the recommendation to save

downloads_remove.description: Remove a downloaded episode from the local library. Response: { ok: true }.

playlists_list.description: List all user playlists. Response: array of PlaylistInfo { id, name, description, createdAt, items[] }.

playlists_create.description: Create a new playlist. Response: the created PlaylistInfo.

playlists_delete.description: Delete a playlist by ID. Response: { ok: true }.

playlists_add.description: Add a podcast episode to a playlist. Response: { ok: true }.

playlists_remove.description: Remove a podcast episode from a playlist. Response: { ok: true }.

media_manifest.description: List all bundled media resources available on the local device. Response: MediaManifest { resourceDir, images[], audio[], lyrics[], defaults }.

media_resource.description: Read a bundled media resource by filename. Response: MediaResourcePayload { name, mimeType, data } where data is base64-encoded by default.
